Spotify GraphQLThe Undocumented Backend

Documenting the undocumented Spotify GraphQL backend API for everyone to use.

Get Started
View on GitHub
🐍

Pure Python Examples

No bloated JS wrappers. Raw HTTP requests that anyone can understand and port to any language.

🔍

Reverse Engineered

Learn how Spotify's internal state machine works behind the scenes using real network traffic.

📁

Categorized Core Features

Clean separation between Playlist Options, User Profiles, and Playback Controls.
